title: pinus beissneri
intro: Pinus beissneri, also known as Beissner's pine or Beissner's fir, is a species of pine tree native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pinus beissneri include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
